nodes.label: Pattern: Feature Gate — DB-Based Runtime Gate
nodes.norm_label: pattern: feature gate — db-based runtime gate

nodes.label: Prohibit: Mutating ExecutionContext directly → create new object + Object.freeze
nodes.norm_label: prohibit: mutating executioncontext directly → create new object + object.freeze

nodes.label: Prohibit: Modifying budget check in only one place → keep wakeAgent + run in sync
nodes.norm_label: prohibit: modifying budget check in only one place → keep wakeagent + run in sync

nodes.label: Prohibit: State transitions without events → must emit eventEmitter.emit
nodes.norm_label: prohibit: state transitions without events → must emit eventemitter.emit

nodes.label: Prohibit: Adding agent type without Zod schema → must register in agent-output-schemas.ts
nodes.norm_label: prohibit: adding agent type without zod schema → must register in agent-output-schemas.ts

nodes.label: Prohibit: Not persisting workflow state to DB → resume impossible after server restart
nodes.norm_label: prohibit: not persisting workflow state to db → resume impossible after server restart

nodes.label: Prohibit: Caching feature gate results → always query DB (guarantee real-time toggle)
nodes.norm_label: prohibit: caching feature gate results → always query db (guarantee real-time toggle)

nodes.label: Rule: Every new state transition must emit AGENT_EVENTS.STATUS_CHANGED
nodes.norm_label: rule: every new state transition must emit agent_events.status_changed

nodes.label: Rule: No data injection in prompts — agents query autonomously
nodes.norm_label: rule: no data injection in prompts — agents query autonomously

nodes.label: Rule: Agents use psql with AGENT_DATABASE_URL (read-only role agent_reader)
nodes.norm_label: rule: agents use psql with agent_database_url (read-only role agent_reader)

nodes.label: Rule: Cost Warning Levels (80% warn, 95% error, 100% block)
nodes.norm_label: rule: cost warning levels (80% warn, 95% error, 100% block)

nodes.label: Rule: Error Recovery Cascade (session conflict → retry → 3 consecutive fail → auto-pause)
nodes.norm_label: rule: error recovery cascade (session conflict → retry → 3 consecutive fail → auto-pause)

nodes.label: Rule: Feature Gate default allow when no DB entry (backward compatible)
nodes.norm_label: rule: feature gate default allow when no db entry (backward compatible)

nodes.label: Rule: Permissions — deniedSkills UNION, allowedTools INTERSECTION, permissionMode last non-undefined
nodes.norm_label: rule: permissions — deniedskills union, allowedtools intersection, permissionmode last non-undefined

nodes.label: Rule: Fallback chain throws first adapter's error type (3-strike cascade compat)
nodes.norm_label: rule: fallback chain throws first adapter's error type (3-strike cascade compat)

nodes.label: Rule: Adding a New Agent — 5-step checklist (seed, rules, schema, domain?, generic)
nodes.norm_label: rule: adding a new agent — 5-step checklist (seed, rules, schema, domain?, generic)
